candidates.why: Candidate COGS label, but preview suggests it includes depreciation/amortization because it pairs with a separate 'Depreciation/Amortization in COR/COGS' row.

variables.notes: R:c. Chose outside the candidate list because the preview strongly suggests 'Costs of Sales' is the net cost-of-sales row excluding the separate 'Depreciation/Amortization in COR/COGS' line, while candidate rows 'Cost of sales' and 'Cost of revenues/COGS' appear to include D&A. Manual review advised because multiple near-duplicate COGS labels exist. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Costs of Sales

candidates.why: Explicit SG&A-style row, but only populated in 2021 in the preview; useful for coverage if reporting changed.

variables.notes: R:nc. Included the explicit SG&A-style row 'Sales/general costs' because it appears for 2021, plus core overhead components 'Selling and marketing expenses' and 'Administrative expenses' for broader year coverage. Included 'Research and development expenses' as required by the XSGA-XRD interaction rule. Manual review needed because several labels are duplicated with identical text in the preview, and some duplicates appear to differ by embedded depreciation/amortization treatment, which cannot be uniquely identified from label text alone.

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D expense line above EBIT; best match.

variables.notes: P:c. Primary choice is 'Research and development expenses'. Added 'Research & Development Exp' as a fallback priority label for possible reporting changes. Manual review needed because 'Research and development expenses' appears twice in the preview and the duplicates seem to differ by separate D&A treatment; exact row identity cannot be disambiguated by label alone.
